utterances.speaker: Carol
utterances.text: Ok , and this is Funny Clown . Funny Clown is only for after his naps , not before his naps or he will not sleep .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Carol , we have been through this before , ok ? We have a good time . We laugh , we play . It is like we are father and son .

utterances.speaker: Susan
utterances.text: Honey , relax . Ross is great with him . Do not look so surprised . I am a lovely person .

utterances.speaker: Susan
utterances.text: Oh , I got that for him .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: My mommies love me . That is clever .

emotion_cause.span: 6_My mommies love me . That is clever .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Uh huh ? Ok . Um , sure , that would be great . See you then . Bye .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Did you just say Hi , Jew ?

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Yes . Uh , yes , I did . That was my friend , Eddie Moskowitz . Yeah , he likes it . Reaffirms his faith .
